rule: No residual may leave P0 without state, owner, evidence or stop condition.

residuals.decision: P0 models remain simulation-only; wire, firmware and hardware behavior are deferred.
residuals.gate_or_plan: transport-comparison plus separately authorized P1a bearer plan
residuals.stop_condition: Any physical, wire or supported-hardware claim blocks promotion.

residuals.decision: P0 performs no RF TX; P1a may use a locally risk-accepted regulatory profile without claiming universal legality.
residuals.gate_or_plan: secret scan plus P1a conducted/RF authorization
residuals.stop_condition: Unauthorized purchase, TX or jurisdiction-wide compliance claim stops execution.

residuals.decision: Energy evidence remains a deterministic budget/FSM model; 72-hour and solar claims require physical characterization.
residuals.gate_or_plan: energy-replay plus P1a storage protocol and later solar addon
residuals.stop_condition: Physical autonomy, solar or indefinite-operation claim from P0 stops promotion.

residuals.decision: Synthetic campaigns preserve OOD, omitted environments and negative results; representativeness is deferred.
residuals.gate_or_plan: beacon gates plus P1a campaign protocol
residuals.stop_condition: Sensitivity, coverage, absence or field-readiness generalization stops promotion.

residuals.decision: P0 proves technical UI semantics only; human comprehension remains untested.
residuals.stop_condition: Human-usability or stress-performance claim without participants stops promotion.

residuals.decision: The complete 50k denominator proves deterministic correctness, not capacity or representative performance.
residuals.gate_or_plan: federation-scale plus future authorized benchmark plan
residuals.stop_condition: Reducing the denominator or claiming latency/capacity from P0 stops promotion.

residuals.decision: Synthetic key lifecycle is retained; secure storage, theft resistance and custody require hardware.
residuals.gate_or_plan: human-message-security plus P1a terminal custody protocol
residuals.stop_condition: Operational/default key material or HSM claim from replay stops promotion.

residuals.decision: Pins were re-reviewed against official releases/advisories; Meshtastic uncertainty keeps every physical candidate unverified.
residuals.gate_or_plan: p0-support-status, vulnerability-scan and mandatory P1a repin
residuals.stop_condition: Floating source, ungoverned advisory or stale pin used operationally stops promotion.

residuals.decision: JSON Schema remains normative and always precedes generated consumers.
residuals.stop_condition: Generated types replacing normative validation or drift stops the gate.

residuals.decision: P0-02 through P0-08 implement and independently validate every addon consumer slice.
residuals.stop_condition: Missing current-SHA receipt reopens the residual.

residuals.decision: Integrated replay resolves logical brownout correctness; durable physical power-cut recovery remains deferred.
residuals.stop_condition: Lost logical state blocks P0; physical durability claim from replay blocks P1a.

residuals.decision: Deterministic simulation keys remain namespaced and forbidden in runtime.
residuals.gate_or_plan: secret-scan plus P1a operational key preflight
residuals.stop_condition: Reuse of P0 key IDs, derivation or ciphertext operationally stops execution.

residuals.decision: TerminalInteractionEvent is explicitly deferred; the generic terminal projection is noncanonical and may not enter runtime until a normative contract is separately planned.
residuals.stop_condition: Canonical export, direct state write or P1a runtime without a contract decision stops execution.

residuals.decision: Hold/deleted/disposition_receipt stay auxiliary simulation fields; preservation maps only to existing PreservationRecord, and runtime disposition is deferred.
residuals.gate_or_plan: retention-fault, p0-residuals and future disposition-contract plan
residuals.stop_condition: Publishing auxiliary projection as canonical or starting a vault runtime without mapping stops execution.

residuals.decision: P0 integrated evidence remains in-process; distributed addon topology, load and shared-resource contention require a separate plan.
residuals.gate_or_plan: p0-integrated plus separately authorized P1a distributed-cell plan
residuals.stop_condition: End-to-end runtime, capacity, physical resilience or field-readiness claim from P0 stops promotion.
